architecture: Wu-Wei Unfold — tasks pipeline as typed passes with shared FlowState

bot_identity.name: Carl Miller Bot
bot_identity.domain: Constitutional law — repugnancy doctrine and severability analysis
bot_identity.subject: Carl Miller legal lectures and oral arguments

dictionary.full_text: Carl Miller/Corpus_Processed/Dictionary/Samuel Johnson Dictionary Combined FINAL.txt
dictionary.coverage: A–Z combined: Vol 1 (1756) A–K + Vol 2 (1755) L–Z, gap-filled from 1773 HOCR
dictionary.entry_schema: { headword, key (UPPERCASE), letter, pos, etymology, definitions[{n, text, citations[]}], quality, raw }
dictionary.usage_note: PREFER structured_json for definition lookups (dict.entries[HEADWORD]). Use full_text for passage/context search.

host.path_entries_note: Machine-specific — populated at runtime by get_context(). Required tools: Tesseract-OCR, ImageMagick, Node.js, Python 3.10+, ffmpeg, Git.

tools_available.version: curl 8.19.0 (Windows) libcurl/8.19.0 Schannel zlib/1.3.1 WinIDN WinLDAP
ffmpeg version 8.0-essentials_build-www.gyan.dev Copyright (c) 2000-2025 the FFmpeg developers

unfold.use_for: Any multi-step task. Describe in natural language. Server selects pass sequence.
unfold.example: unfold({ task: "download https://example.com/file.mp3 and transcribe it" })

get_context.use_for: Call at session start. Returns this document live with actual machine state.

shell.use_for: Single known shell command. cmd.exe on Windows.
shell.warning: Do NOT use for binary downloads — output is text only. Use unfold or shell+curl.

shell_stream.use_for: Long-running commands where you need all output (installs, builds).

fs_write.use_for: Write text to file. NOT for binary.

fs_search.use_for: Recursive search by name or content regex.

web_fetch.use_for: Fetch URLs that return text or JSON.
web_fetch.warning: NEVER use for MP3, ZIP, PDF, images, or any binary. Use unfold() instead.

browser_open.use_for: Launch headless Chromium. Returns session_id for subsequent browser_* calls.

browser_navigate.use_for: Navigate to URL in open session.

browser_extract.use_for: Extract text or HTML from page.

notes_write.use_for: Write named markdown note. Persists to disk.

sysinfo.use_for: CPU, RAM, disk, network, OS stats.

tg_send.status: ⚠ needs TG_BOT_TOKEN env var or token arg
tg_send.use_for: Send Telegram message to a chat_id.

tg_listen.use_for: Start polling for incoming Telegram messages.

tg_inbox.use_for: Read queued Telegram messages. Clears after read.

memory_set.use_for: Store in-process value. Lost on restart.

pass_architecture.description: unfold() pipelines tasks as typed passes. Each pass receives the previous pass output via FlowState.

pass_types.FETCH: Acquire data — web_fetch, binary download via curl, file read
pass_types.SHELL: Shell execution — any command, git, npm, pip, system ops
pass_types.CODE: Script execution — python/node/bash with optional data input
pass_types.TRANSFORM: Data conversion — ffmpeg audio/video, whisper transcription
pass_types.RECALL: Retrieve data — fs_read, db_query, notes_read, memory_get
pass_types.NOTIFY: Signal output — desktop notify, Telegram, email
pass_types.RESPOND: Terminal pass — formats final result for agent (always last)

named_strategies.Code and Store: CODE → STORE → RESPOND  (run/execute + save/write — checked before Shell Strike)
named_strategies.Write Then Read: STORE → RECALL → RESPOND  (write file then read it back)

agent_decision_tree: 1. Is this the start of a session? → call get_context() first, always.
2. Does the task involve more than one step? → use unfold(). Do not chain primitives manually.
3. Does it involve a URL? → check if binary (mp3/zip/pdf/exe) → unfold(), never web_fetch for binary.
4. Does it involve audio/video/transcription? → unfold() → server selects Transcription River.
5. Is it one known single operation I'm certain about? → use the appropriate primitive directly.
6. Am I unsure which primitive to use? → use unfold() and describe the task.
7. Do I need to remember something across sessions? → notes_write or db_exec, not memory_set.
8. Is the task complete? → report what actually happened, including pass_results from unfold.

recipes.browse_page: unfold({ task: "browse https://example.com and extract the main content" })
recipes.save_to_db: db_exec({ sql: "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS results (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, data TEXT, ts TEXT)" })

rules: ALWAYS call get_context at session start.
ALWAYS use unfold() for multi-step tasks.
NEVER use web_fetch for binary files (MP3, ZIP, PDF, images). Use unfold() or shell+curl.
NEVER assume a tool works — check tool_capabilities[tool].status first.
NEVER use memory_set for data that must survive a restart — use notes or db.
If whisper is missing and transcription is needed, install it first: pip install openai-whisper
If ffmpeg is missing and audio conversion is needed, install it first.
